title: The Emerald Ripples
lines: The water here is deeper, a thick, emerald-edged blackness that hide the floor entirely. Your beam of light reflects off thousands of tiny ripples on the surface.
Something is moving beneath the water—not a zombie, but something multiple-limbed and ancient, drawn to the terminal's frequency.
The walls start to close in, and the sound of the pump becomes a rhythmic, mechanical heartbeat.

options.desc: 1. Swim across the dark pool to reach the far tunnel
2. Carefully sidestep along the narrow masonry edge
3. Retreat to the main sewer hub
